content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules automated hourly repeating push notifications (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:9-11) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications, all day long" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt), matching Apple's spam-push pattern.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits using push notifications for unsolicited advertising, promotions, or spam-like repeated alerts not tied to user-initiated actions — this scheduler fires unconditionally every hour without any user opt-in per alert. Combine that with metadata bragging about "unlimited" hourly notifications, and this is a near-certain 4.5.4/4.5.1 rejection or app removal trigger. Fix by requiring explicit user opt-in for frequency, letting users control alert cadence, and removing the "unlimited/every hour" marketing language.
